title: gasteranthus lateralis
intro: Gasteranthus lateralis, also known as the 'Lateral Gasteranthus', is a species of epiphytic plant in the family Borgeaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Gasteranthus lateralis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Gasteranthus lateralis is typically dried and then used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
